title: Dannah #1837
definition:
Dannah = "thou hast judged" or "judgement"

 1) a town in the hill country of Judah, probably south or southwest
    of Hebron
nasbUsage:

 1) a town in the hill country of Judah, probably south or southwest
    of Hebron

    NASB:  a city in Judah
